Title: MEDEVAK (CCRM) — Combat Casualty Record Module
Description: Проект МЕДЕВАК — модуль обліку бойових поранень. Backend: FastAPI, SQLite, Alembic. Dashboard: Next.js 14. Контекст: https://vovkydavinci.army/ — батальйон Вовки Да Вінчі. Репозиторій: MEDEVAK_clone.

Title: Sync is fake — stats 0,0,0 and empty queue
Description: sync.py returns hardcoded pending:0, synced:0, failed:0; queue:[]. No offline/retry logic. No queue table, no retry logic, no status tracking.

Title: Auth is mock — any client can access
Description: deps.py:10-12 returns mock user. No production auth. Not production-safe.

Title: PDF export returns JSON, not PDF
Description: exports.py:74-86 returns JSON envelope with map_case_to_pdf_data, NOT PDF file. pdf_exporter.export_case_to_pdf returns b'' and is NOT used by API.

Title: Dashboard has no document upload UI
Description: documents/page.tsx — list only, no upload. API exists (POST /documents/upload) but unusable from UI.

Title: documentsApi has no upload method
Description: api.ts has list only. No upload() for dashboard. Cannot upload even if UI added.

Title: March, Evacuation, Tourniquets return empty
Description: march.py:22, evacuation.py:21, tourniquets.py:21 return []. No data model or logic.

Title: pdf_exporter returns b'' — dead code
Description: API uses map_case_to_pdf_data. pdf_exporter returns empty bytes — dead code path.

Title: Procedures comment says stub but implemented
Description: procedures.py:1 comment wrong. Actually uses ProcedureRepository, returns real DB data.

Title: handoff.py bare pass in except blocks
Description: handoff.py:49,60,73,86 — bare pass in except blocks (swallows errors).

Title: Android app absent
Description: android-app folder not restored. Documented as not in clone.
